"[12] 76-10 97 W/ CALFIRE // TRYING TO FIND AN ACCESS RD FOR CFIRE SO FAR NOT ACCESIBLE // 76-S6 CPYS"

"[1] TO SINGLETON #3 LN WILL BE CLOSED TILL 0500"

Log.Location: "20 Mule Team Rd / TWENTY MULE TEAM RD OFR"

details.IncidentDetail: "[34] 1039 FRONTIER 877-677-0730 // WILL SEND A TECHNICIAN TOMORROW MORNING // INCIDENT #7192827"
"[32] 1039 ATandT 800-247-2020 // WILL RECALL WITH A TICKET NUMBER"
"[30] KERN CO RDS 1097 AND SET UP CONES IN THE AREA // KERN CO RDS ADVSING THE POLE BELONGS TO ATandT REQ TO TRY THEM AGAIN"
"[28] 1039 KEITH WITH CO RDS // ADVSD CREW SHOULD BE ARRIVING WITHIN THE NEXT TEN MINUTES OR SO\"
"[27] B59-020 REQ ETA FROM CO RDS "
"[24] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1125-Traffic Hazard to 20002-Hit and Run No Injuries by CHP"
"[21] 1021 ATT - POLE DOES NOT BELONG TO THEM"
"[19] 1021 TO FRONTIER; POLE DOES NOT BELONG TO THEM"
"[15] 59-2 REQ TO INQ WITH ATT IF THE POLE IS THEIRS AND UPDATED ETA "
"[14] PER EDISON , NEG ON BEING AN EDISON POLE "
"[9] KA36 POLE DAMAGED - INFO FOR ATT "
